case_title: ED CHRISMAN VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISMAN, ED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2003

AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA. (212)
